Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Interpret expanded namespace names independently from chosen prefixes and preserve unsupported extension provenance.

For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Defend the Feed Ts Namespace Expanded Name model · Theory Feed Ts N…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: The literal prefix identifies an XML vocabulary.
